summary: Completed comprehensive testing of HappyCo Concierge V1 Phase 4 foundation including backend APIs, frontend UI, authentication flows, and admin diagnostics functionality
passed_tests: Admin login with seeded account admin@happyco.com works
Manager login with seeded account manager@riverside.com works
Resident login with seeded account alex.chen@email.com works
Invalid login credentials properly rejected with 401
Secure cookie session establishment and /api/auth/session endpoint working
Admin role protection - only admin users can access diagnostics endpoints
Non-admin role restrictions - manager and resident get 403 on diagnostics access
Diagnostics runtime endpoint shows app_env, host, db_name and config status
Diagnostics session endpoint shows current user and role info
Diagnostics collections endpoint returns collection counts
Preview reset placeholder returns 501 not implemented as expected
Login page loads with Phase 4 foundation UI correctly
Diagnostics page displays environment data and control center
Manager login shows appropriate non-admin session message
Resident login shows appropriate non-admin session message
Demo account panel visible in preview environment
No frontend compilation or runtime errors detected
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (17/17 tests passed), Frontend: 95% (19/20 tests passed - 1 navigation timeout during complex flow testing)
